app.title: Microsoft VibeVoice: Open-Source Frontier Voice AI
app.author: tosh
proposed_tests: Install VibeVoice SDK, test authentication API
Verify voice recognition accuracy for a known speaker
Implement VibeVoice in a chatbot to evaluate UI
